svg.text: Ground feeders blocked; aerial species cross freely

g.text: Two dashed green horizontal fences span the map.
Ground feeders (Gado Nelore) cannot cross them.
Their "flies=False" flag means the fence repulsion
force bounces them back. Aerial species ignore the
fence entirely (flies=True) and pass through freely.
Birdlife is unaffected; cattle are corralled.
